section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's gait was antalgic with a slight limp and decreased velocity.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Description of gait pattern is an observed physical exam finding, not a patient-reported symptom.

section_miscategorizations.text: She is not using an assistive device.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Use of assistive device is typically documented as an observed functional/physical exam finding; here it is framed as a factual status rather than clearly as a patient report.

section_miscategorizations.text: The incision site is noted to have mild swelling and tenderness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Swelling and tenderness at the incision are exam findings; the phrasing 'is noted to have' indicates clinician observation rather than patient report.

section_miscategorizations.text: Range of motion is 0 to 120 degrees.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Quantified range of motion is a measured physical exam finding, not a subjective report.
